title: Akanabe-sensei wa Tereshirazu
titleNative: 茜部先生は照れ知らず
synonyms: Akanabe-sensei Doesn't Know about Embarrassment
synopsis: Koki Sakieda is an assistant for Akira Akanebe, a manga artist he admires, who always tries to praise him in some way. Sakieda is worried that he will end up falling in love with her if this situation continues. Then Akanebe unexpectedly asks him to go out with her....... The story depicts the daily life of Akanebe-sensei, who lavishes praise on Sakieda without embarrassment, and Sakieda, who tries to accept it all gracefully. (Source: Natalie, translated)

titleRomaji: Kutabire Salarymen no Ore, 7-nenburi ni Saikai Shita Bishoujo JK to Dousei wo Hajimaru

synonyms: Kutabire Salaryman no Ore 7nenburi nisaikai shita Bishujo JK to Dosei wo Kojimaru
I, a Tired Office Worker, Start Living Together with a Beautiful Highschool Girl Whom I Met Again after 7 Years
synopsis: A beautiful high school girl suddenly shows up at the door of Yuya Amae, a tired salaryman! It is Aoi Shiratori, his childhood friend, who has come to ask Yuya to marry her… again! And so begins their life of living together! Yuya tries to act like a responsible guardian, but Aoi's aggressive approach is causing his resolve to waver…? A JK childhood friend with a marriage proposal! A sweet ideal romantic comedy! (Source: ComicWalker, translated)

title: Isekai Henkyou Meshi
titleNative: 異世界辺境メシ
synopsis: A lone diner stands in the remote frontier. Drawn by the cooking of a human known only as “Master,” demons, elves, and others of all races gather to savor his food. On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: アイドルマスター シンデレラガールズ U149
synopsis: Spin-off manga of THE IDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls , focusing on younger idols. The manga centers around girls under 149 centimeters tall (under about 4-feet, 11-inches) who aspire to be idols despite not having a producer or gigs. However, maybe with a marvelous dress, a marvelous stage, and a marvelous prince ... The new Cinderella story follows these small idols and their small rookie producer. (Source: Anime News Network, edited) Note: The chapter count includes 152 chapters released in magazine and 33 extra chapters.

titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synonyms: After School I'll Be You
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleRomaji: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleNative: 病弱妹妹总是肖想我
synonyms: My Sickly Sister Always Misses Me
synopsis: Xu Yulian is the eldest daughter of a wealthy family, smart and beautiful. Her life should've been a smooth ride, until she ran into a stumbling block named "Xu Wenjiao." Her sister came out of nowhere and became the person she hates the most. When she was a child, the frail Xu Wenjiao occupied all of her mother's time and attention. After she grew up, Xu Yulian had a crush on the neighbor girl who had just returned from studying abroad. But before she could get up the courage, she saw the girl confess to Xu Wenjiao instead. In this house, it's going to be either her or Xu Wenjiao, one or the other. Xu Yulian got so angry that she actually packed her bags to leave home, but her sister, who always seemed so weak and frail, suddenly grabbed her by the wrist wrist and pushed her into the corner. Xu Wenjiao looked at her jealously and whispered in her ear: "Sister, why do you like her but not me?" Xu Yulian blushed, "Xu Wenjiao, are you crazy? Have you been reading too many bad romance novels to be acting this way?" (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Koisuru Asteroid
titleNative: 恋する小惑星
synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Tuojiang
titleNative: 脱缰
synonyms: Mad for Love
เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

title: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleRomaji: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleNative: 私だって青春したいですよ、本当は。
synonyms: The truth is, I want to enjoy my youth too.
I want to be young too, actually.
synopsis: Her hobbies are reading, and she's average at studying and sports. Otobe Murasaki is a high school student who lives a quiet life, thinking she's just a mob character, but she doesn't like Fujimi Akiko, who is always the center of attention in the class. However, as soon as she becomes a member of the gardening committee like Akiko, she quickly falls in love with her, as she talks to her in a friendly manner. Just as she is wondering if there's any way she can get closer to her, she happens to come across Akiko crying after a breakup... A girls' love comedy about a simple mob character and a sparkling girl with a difficult future ahead! (source: Ichijinsha, translated)

synopsis: High schooler Odagiri Momo leaves her home island to attend high school on the mainland. Having grown up on a boring island, Momo dreams of becoming a detective and is always on the lookout for cases. After moving into her first apartment, she meets the mysterious beauty Akaishi Kotone and falls for her at first sight. Declaring she'll make the reluctant Kotone her “assistant” against her will, the two form a buddy team to solve small everyday mysteries together. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

synopsis: "Please go out with me, with the intent of eventual marriage!" How will Sumire handle the unexpected proposal from her favorite actor Saki-kun? "I love you, but I'm just a fan. You can't be serious!?" As she spends time with Saki-kun every day, can Sumire avoid breaking the boundary between between idol and fan? It's a love comedy about a fan being pursued by her idol! title: Yamato wa Koi no Mahoroba
titleNative: やまとは恋のまほろば
synonyms: Yamato is a Splendid Place for Love
synopsis: College student Sanwa Honoka is ridiculed by male students for her plump figure. As her best friend gets the most out of college life, her only solace is the Ancient Tomb Study Group, where she can talk about her favorite things, surrounded by two laid-back male members. However, Honoka considers member Iida as a lover at a certain moment. A poetic psychological depiction of how a girl with low self-esteem finds spiritual support and matures. (Source: Japan Media Arts Festival) Note: - A Jury Selection award winner in the Manga Section of the 23rd Japan Media Arts Festival. - Originally published on LINE Manga until it was cancelled on 2020-10-11. The serialization moved to Bunshun Online and new chapters published starting 2022-06-20.

title: Girls x Vampire
titleNative: ガールズ×ヴァンパイア
synonyms: Girls × Vampire
synopsis: "Yes! Yes! I finally bit one!" Luluna Von Bettelheim, four-hundred-year-old vampire of noble lineage, wakes from her long slumber, and on a whim, enrolls in a human school. There she bites a girl and gains a servant. "Shower me with praise!" she orders. But her command leads to even more affection an she expected. Teren Mikami (prose) and Minori Chigusa (manga) team up to bring you a sensual girls' comedy about a vampire and her cute, high-school servant Wakana. (Source: One Peace Books) Note: Originally self-published on Twitter and note, was then licensed by Akita Shoten for serialization.

title: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki: Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga @comic
titleEnglish: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleNative: 最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 ～下僕の妖怪どもに比べてモンスターが弱すぎるんだが～
synonyms: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji: These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji ~ These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai~
synopsis: Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation—when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done—will his powers be enough to live a happy life?! (Source: J-Novel Club)

titleNative: 今朝も揺られてます

Will this budding love story ever blossom? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

tags.description: Features deliberate exaggeration of popular tropes or a particular genre to comedic effect.

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
Jirai Nandesuka? Chihara-san
Chihara, es-tu une Jirai ?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
